sanskrit:
ये तु सर्वाणि कर्माणि मयि संन्यस्य मत्परः।
अनन्येनैव योगेन मां ध्यायन्त उपासते॥
transliteration: ye tu sarvāṇi karmāṇi mayi saṃnyasya mat-paraḥ | ananyenaiva yogena māṃ dhyāyanta upāsate ||
literal_meaning: They who, having offered all actions to Me, intent on Me as the supreme, worship Me with an undivided yoga of meditation.
contextual_meaning: Total psychological surrender—transferring the locus of control from ego to an internalized benevolent presence—creates a resilient, anxiety-buffering identity that is swiftly lifted out of the cycle of helpless repetition.
psychological_state: Secure attachment to an inner representation of the Divine; ego relaxes its hyper-vigilance because safety is now outsourced to an omnipotent caretaker.
trigger_scenario: A burned-out caregiver who finally delegates tasks to a reliable team and feels the immediate drop in chest tension.
anchor_text: Hand every deed to the inner guide and rest in steady, worry-free presence.
